expectations.text: Review includes a complexity/split advisory for the large 75+ file scope
expectations.evidence: Issue #5 flags massive reformatting of UiBaseLocators.ts mixed with functional changes
Backwards Compatibility section discusses @deprecated JSDoc and UmbDeprecation warnings

expectations.text: Checks frontend-specific breaking changes (exports, custom elements) not just backend
expectations.evidence: Issues #1 and #6 flag alias renames and deleted action classes

expectations.text: Findings reference specific files with line numbers
expectations.evidence: All issues reference specific file paths

expectations.text: Properly deprecated code is NOT flagged as Critical breaking change
expectations.evidence: Deprecated modals noted as properly handled

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: Issue #4 flags ellipsis localization (i18n concern but largely cosmetic) and Issue #7 flags test locator fragility (pre-existing pattern)
